name: Balance sheet items of other monetary financial institutions
description_short: Balance sheet data for monetary financial institutions other than the central bank, covering assets and liabilities by counterpart sector, currency and maturity. Complements the BSI dataset with additional breakdowns.
use_cases: What is the total deposit base of euro area banks broken down by currency?
How are MFI assets distributed across different counterpart sectors?
What is the maturity structure of loans granted by euro area banks?
How have bank liabilities changed since the introduction of QE?
